title: thymus fontqueri
intro: Thymus fontqueri, also known as the Fontquer's thyme or Spanish thyme, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula and is known for its small, pink or white flowers and its medicinal properties. The leaves of Thymus fontqueri contain thymol, a compound with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Thymus fontqueri include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to soothe sore throats, relieve stress, and promote digestive health.
